boundary.design_rule: CtxVault may write reviewed local handoff artifacts and receipts; users control external tools.

surfaces.label: Codex / AGENTS.md
surfaces.risk_to_explain: projected file may be read by the target tool when the user runs that tool

surfaces.context_scope: Claude Code project memory file projection
surfaces.label: Claude Code / CLAUDE.md
surfaces.risk_to_explain: CLAUDE.md can be loaded by Claude Code according to Claude Code memory behavior

surfaces.context_scope: portable packet with no runtime assumption
surfaces.label: Generic Packet
surfaces.risk_to_explain: user chooses the final destination manually
user_controls: decide where to paste or attach

surfaces.context_scope: external project workspace controlled by ChatGPT
surfaces.label: ChatGPT Project
surfaces.risk_to_explain: project memory and uploaded files are controlled outside CtxVault
user_controls: manually copy or upload reviewed packet if desired

branch_decisions.reason: preview writes no governed source imports or projections
packet-only handoff has no projection output path
projection is blocked when selection or privacy gates do not pass
receipt path is the audit proof for this handoff

warnings.message: Selected context estimates 34 tokens against a budget of 1.
warnings.suggested_fix: Reduce selected slice refs or raise the token budget before projecting.

release_surface: Core + optional notarized Mac App Alpha + Demo Vault + Receipt/Trust Gallery

selected_slices.preview: Conflicting note: auto-promote every extracted claim into durable memory without review. This contradicts the governed memory review rule.

selected_slices.preview: Current decision: CtxVault is a governed local context substrate. It must preserve provenance, privacy preflight, receipts, and projection boundaries.

selected_slices.preview: Current target: write AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md only after selection, privacy preflight, context quality, and receipt generation pass.
